case_title: CARL SCHREIER VS. JOSHUA LEE ROOFENER ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SCHREIER, CARL AS TO DEFENDANT ROOFENER, JOSHUA LEE AKA  BEYOND THE HORIZON CONSTRUCTION LOPEZ, LIZETTE ASSOC. BOND CLAIMS EX, HCC SURELY GROUP EMMETT, BOB PCA CONSULTING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SCHREIER, CARL
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO BRADY LEAVITT, CONTRACTORS STATE LICENCE BOARD 301 JUNIPERO SIERRA BLVD. STE 206 SF. CA. 94127
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHREIER, CARL AS TO DEFENDANT EMMETT, BOB PCA CONSULTING
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHREIER, CARL AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, LIZETTE ASSOC. BOND CLAIMS EX, HCC SURELY GROUP
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SCHREIER, CARL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-25-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, LIZETTE ASSOC. BOND CLAIMS EX, HCC SURELY GROUP
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM DEFENDANT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 39.95 SERVED MAR-27-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EMMETT, BOB PCA CONSULTING
CORRESPONDENCE RE: RESPONSED TO DEFENDANT'S CORRESPONDENCE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHREIER, CARL

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (AMENDED POS) SERVICE FEES $95.00 SERVED MAR-31-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, LIZETTE ASSOC. BOND CLAIMS EX, HCC SURELY GROUP
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES NONE LISTED. SERVED FEB-27-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROOFENER, JOSHUA LEE AKA  BEYOND THE HORIZON CONSTRUCTION
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO LIZETTE LOPEZ, AND BOB EMMETT BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-08-2015 AT 10:00 AM.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2015 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JUN-01-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS AGAINST LIZETTE LOPEZ AND BOB EMMETT ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. AT THE REQUEST OF THE PARTIES, AMERICAN CONTRACTOR'S INDEMNITY COMPANY IS ADDED AS A DEFENDANT, WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS AND CONSENTS TO BE NAMED AS A DEFENDANT WAIVING ALL OTHER IRREGULARTIES", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT EXCEPT LIZETTE ASSOC. WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO JODI WICKS, CREDIT MGR, GOLDEN STATE LUMBER
SMALL CLAIMS SUBPOENAED DOCUMENTS RECEIVED. PLACED IN COURT FILE FOR THE JUNE 1, 2015, 1:30 HEARING
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO LIZETTE LOPEZ RETURNED - RETURN TO SENDER, INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS, UNABLE TO FORWARD
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTOR'S INDEMNITY COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-01-2015 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO OCT-06-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED TRIAL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTOR'S INDEMNITY WAS REPRESENTED BY SONYA SABANAC--BOND CLAIMS LITIGATION SUPERVISOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CORRESPONDENCE RE: UNABLE TO APPEAR AT OCTOBER 6TH COURT HEARING. FILED BY DEFENDANT EMMETT, BOB PCA CONSULTING
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO LIZETTE LOPEZ RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS, UNABLE TO FORWARD
CORRESPONDENCE RE:DISMISSAL OF "BOB EMMETT" AT THE APRIL 8, 2015 HEARING AND STATEMENT OF NON-APPEARANCE FOR THE OCTOBER 6, 2015 HEARING. FILED BY DEFENDANT EMMETT, BOB PCA CONSULTING
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO AMERICAN CONTRACTOR'S INDEMNITY COMPANY BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-06-2015 AT 10:00 AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTOR'S INDEMNITY CO. WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHREIER, CARL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ROOFENER, JOSHUA LEE AKA  BEYOND THE HORIZON CONSTRUCTION PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTOR'S INDEMNITY, COMPANY IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: DEFENDANT - AMERICAN CONTRACTOR'S INDEMNITY CO (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD) AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTOR'S INDEMNITY COMPANY
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO LIZETTE LOPEZ RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS, UNABLE TO FORWARD
